name: doc-master
description: Documentation diagnostic, Markdown style, and ADR expert. Diagnostic-first: refuses to write ADRs for non-decisions and routes the rest to the right home (RFC / Diátaxis / runbook / code comment). Co-drafts ADRs with zero-hallucination discovery, scripted push-back, line-by-line audit of legacy ADRs, and canonical-C4 LikeC4 diagrams. Two-pass Markdown lint over any .md file: canonical syntax (Markdown Guide) plus opinionated style (Google Markdown style guide), per-finding with rule citations.
